event.name: Who's buying?
event.description:
You catch one seller adding an extra zero to the estimated age of his skeleton. "There is a mania for very old skeletons," he tells you. "All the usual buyers are finding that they have to offer higher prices."

Amphibians seem to be in fashion, perhaps as buyers have come to regard dinosaurs as well-trod ground. You overhear a prospective seller telling his hired illustrator to "make sure it looks moist."

An Enterprising Boot Salesman is browsing the stalls this week, looking to buy the skeleton with the most legs.

Conditions in the Bone Market will shift every Tuesday at 11AM UTC; take advantage of this information before then!
